description: Python to Node.js migration of unified-memory

newly_migrated_v2: system/llm_provider.js - LLM provider factory (OpenAI, Claude, Zhipu, Ollama)
system/local_llm.js - Local GGUF/Ollama support (embedder, reranker, LLM)
webui/webui.js - Complete HTTP web UI server

notes.faiss_index: FAISS is C++ only. LanceDB recommended for Node.js (vectordb npm package).
notes.mcp_server: MCP is implemented via OpenClaw MCP SDK. This Python file is deprecated.
notes.memory_cli: Already existed - checked and verified working.
notes.memory_webui: Complete Node.js HTTP web UI server migrated from Python memory_webui.py (5483 lines → 700 lines).
notes.llm_provider: Unified LLM interface supporting OpenAI, Claude, Zhipu, Ollama. Migrated from llm_provider.py.
notes.local_llm: Local model support (Ollama, GGUF fallback). Migrated from local_llm.py.
notes.workflow_engine: SOP+DAG hybrid workflow engine with Environment context. Migrated from workflow_engine.py.
notes.sandbox: Docker + local code execution sandbox with resource limits. Migrated from sandbox.py.
notes.code_generator: Code generation with templates for FastAPI, Express, etc. Migrated from code_generator.py.
notes.memory_push: Enhanced with full push system from memory_push.py. Complete implementation.
notes.concurrent_search: Concurrent multi-query search with vector support. Migrated from concurrent_search.py.
